message: What a day! Our Grand Summer Sale kicked off this morning at 10, and the response has been insane. Can't believe we're already 5 hours in

```
order_log_2025-06-01.locked

this explains why there were errors in checkout logs saying write failed , read-only filesystem

The playbook  indicates:
Disconnect the infected server -> Platforms 

Cut off infrastructure traffic -> Platforms

Disconnect DB & freeze backup -> Application

Detach from Shared Resource -> Platforms

Take snapshots (Disk & Memory) -> Ask team

Kill suspicious process or activity -> Platforms

Rebuild from clean backup → Platforms

Re-enable security agent on the servers → Security

Reconnect traffic to services and monitor → Platforms
